title: api.json tier resolver and tier field on items

source.subject: feat(doc): add api-shape tier resolver and `tier` field on api.json items

body:
## What shipped

The doc pipeline adds a tier resolver and writes a `tier` field on api.json items so registry UI and coverage tests can distinguish Tier0–Tier2 corelib surface.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `3614154`

> feat(doc): add api-shape tier resolver and `tier` field on api.json items

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
